query:
SELECT u.name, u.id, u.email, COUNT(c.id) as total_contratos, SUM(c.valorVenda) as vgv_total
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN contratos c ON c.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
ORDER BY total_contratos DESC;
